description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a soft, plush appearance and a light pink fabric upholstery. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all with a slightly tufted, cloud-like contour. The armrests are straight, slim, and rise to the same height as the backrest, framed by a dark, likely wooden or metal structure that outlines the sides and back. The legs are slender and positioned at the corners, providing a minimalistic and elevated look. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on comfort and subtle elegance. The sofa would fit well in urban outdoor or indoor public spaces, such as parks, lobbies, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A modern, light pink two-seater sofa with plush, tufted cushions and slim, straight armrests framed by a dark structure. The design is clean, comfortable, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim, straight armrest and the depth of the plush seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous backrest framed by the dark structure and the two large back cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight armrest and cushion depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two individual seat and back cushions, the open seating area, and the symmetrical armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all similarly sized and slightly tufted, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, slim armrests at seat height, framed by a dark structural outline, with minimal padding and a modern, squared profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender legs, one at each corner, likely made of wood or metal, with a straight, exposed design and dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width, and no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light pink fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on the cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
